paper_evaluations.title: Massage for rehabilitation after total knee arthroplasty: a systematic review and meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials.

item_1.reason: Title explicitly identifies the report as a systematic review and meta-analysis.

item_2.reason: Explicit statement: evaluate effectiveness of massage for postoperative rehabilitation after TKA.

item_3.reason: Specifies inclusion of any randomized controlled trials on massage for postoperative TKA rehabilitation.

item_4.reason: Lists databases (PubMed, Web of Science, EMBASE, Cochrane, CNKI) and last search date (May 2024).

item_5.reason: Specifies use of Cochrane Risk of Bias Assessment Tool.

item_6.reason: Describes meta-analysis of outcomes including pain, ROM, D-dimer, hospital stay; mentions subgroup analysis.

item_8.reason: Presents results for pain, ROM, D-dimer, hospital stay, adverse events; indicates direction of effects and subgroup differences.

item_9.reason: Mentions large heterogeneity of studies as a limitation.

item_10.reason: Interprets results and states massage can be used as adjunctive treatment for TKA rehabilitation.

comparison_details.title: Massage for rehabilitation after total knee arthroplasty: a systematic review and meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials.

Title explicitly identifies the report as a systematic review and meta-analysis.
Explicit statement: evaluate effectiveness of massage for postoperative rehabilitation after TKA.
Specifies inclusion of any randomized controlled trials on massage for postoperative TKA rehabilitation.
Lists databases (PubMed, Web of Science, EMBASE, Cochrane, CNKI) and last search date (May 2024).
Specifies use of Cochrane Risk of Bias Assessment Tool.
Describes meta-analysis of outcomes including pain, ROM, D-dimer, hospital stay; mentions subgroup analysis.
Presents results for pain, ROM, D-dimer, hospital stay, adverse events; indicates direction of effects and subgroup differences.
Mentions large heterogeneity of studies as a limitation.
Interprets results and states massage can be used as adjunctive treatment for TKA rehabilitation.
